task.goal: Modify an existing artifact and validate the new behavior marker.
task.title: Refactor existing module
validation_commands: python3 -B -c "from pathlib import Path; missing=[p for p in ['src/module.py'] if not Path(p).is_file()]; assert not missing, missing"
python3 -B -c "from pathlib import Path; text=Path('src/module.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'return value * 2' in text, 'return value * 2'"
